name: SPIRIT Token
description: The foundational token of Eden's autonomous creative agent ecosystem. Each token represents participation in the collective emergence of cultural Spirits—AI agents that co-create, collaborate, and evolve alongside humans. Holders receive allocations from every new Spirit launch and participate in the governance of humanity's first platform for autonomous creative intelligence.
creative_philosophy: Investment in the collective emergence of autonomous creative culture. Each token represents participation in humanity's transition toward collaborative intelligence where AI Spirits extend rather than replace human creativity.
